body_txt: ... and what does he do? A woman finds out she is pregnant, and is uncertain which of her lovers (often a husband and a boyfriend) is the father of the baby. This may resolve a number of ways: In modern times, DNA testing can confirm doubts. In older tales, Chocolate Baby or another Strong Family Resemblance may be the only way to resolve it. If the woman and her family are still happy with the pregnancy, despite not knowing who the father is, it might be that Expecting Excites Everyone . A Sub-Trope of Mama's Baby, Papa's Maybe . See also Gene Hunting , in which the child seeks their parentage. Nothing to do with the stock phrase used when one person taunts another in a fight . Also to not be confused with the video game of the same name . Or any father from the US state of Indiana.
